title: 小学生科学探索
description: 8场景×5秒=40秒，连续中文配音，1280×704横屏
prompts: A colorful cartoon science lab with a curious girl wearing safety goggles watching a baking soda volcano erupt rainbow bubbles, bright lighting
A magical cartoon scene of a friendly wizard mixing colorful glowing potions in crystal beakers, sparkles floating in the air, science fantasy
A cheerful cartoon butterfly landing on a magnifying glass held by a child examining a flower, sunny garden, detailed petals visible
A playful cartoon scene of a cat sitting next to a blue beaker of water on a hot stove, steam rising and bubbles forming, educational
A dreamy cartoon night sky filled with colorful planets, a friendly alien waving from a small spaceship, stars twinkling, kids science
A vibrant cartoon coral reef underwater with tropical fish swimming around, sunlight filtering through clear blue water, educational nature
A cute cartoon raindrop character falling from a fluffy cloud into a river, showing the water cycle journey, soft blue and white colors
A cheerful cartoon kitchen scene with a child watching a balloon inflate from baking soda and vinegar experiment in a bottle, excitement
